data.body: Extend OrchestrationWave to contain an optional steps[] array where each step is a concurrent execution group of beats. Update NDJSON output protocol in buildPrompt() to document step-level structure within waves. Update normalizePlan/normalizeWave to handle steps. Backward-compatible: if no steps, treat wave.beats as a single implicit step.
data.title: Add Step concept to OrchestrationWave type and output protocol
